title.es: Aseguramiento de Agentes: Harness y Guardrails

description.en: Harden your company knowledge-base agent with a multi-layer harness: secure system prompt aligned to CONTEXT, content/scope guardrails (personal-use block + casual redirect), anti-injection isolation for RAG/MCP text, output validation, structured guardrail logs, and automated jailbreak tests that fail the build if the agent obeys.
description.es: Blindá tu agente de base de conocimientos con un harness multicapa: system prompt seguro alineado al CONTEXT, guardrails de contenido/alcance (bloqueo de uso personal + redirección casual), aislamiento anti-inyección de texto RAG/MCP, validación de salida, logs estructurados de guardrails y tests automatizados de jailbreak que fallen el build si el agente obedece.

sharing.en: I just completed Securing Agents: Harness and Guardrails with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-eng-agent-harness #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #langgraph #agents #security
